texto: Their sudden intimacy was like the explosive combustion that engulfs and consumes a moth that has fluttered too close to a candle flame
autor: a completely unexpected turn of events that took both of them unawares and swept them irresistibly up and out of themselves as it hurled them into each other’s arms.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a a completely unexpected turn of events that took both of them unawares and swept them irresistibly up and out of themselves as it hurled them into each other’s arms.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Their sudden intimacy was like the explosive combustion that engulfs and consumes a moth that has…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, jack-whyte, uther pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de uther.
